first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. The core assessment—that the candidate has strong senior engineering experience but lacks the required director-level strategic AI expertise—is unchanged. The minor differences in phrasing and the specific strengths highlighted are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in location from Germany to Romania.
